# Chronic Mystery

> When You're Exhausted and Nobody Can Tell You Why

## About This Site

Chronic Mystery is an editorial health publication covering ME/CFS (Myalgic Encephalomyelitis/Chronic Fatigue Syndrome), chronic fatigue, fibromyalgia, post-viral fatigue, POTS, and related chronic conditions. We publish evidence-based articles that validate the patient experience while exploring the medical science, practical management strategies, identity challenges, and contemplative dimensions of living with invisible illness.

## Key Facts

- URL: https://chronicmystery.com
- Publisher: Chronic Mystery Editorial
- Author: Kalesh (Consciousness Teacher & Writer)
- Content type: Long-form health articles (1500-3000 words each)
- Total published articles: 303+
- Publishing schedule: Daily (5 articles/day during growth phase)
- Audience: People with ME/CFS, chronic fatigue, fibromyalgia, post-viral conditions, and their caregivers

## Content Sections

### The Medical
Research findings, treatment options, diagnostic advances, and evolving scientific understanding of chronic fatigue conditions. Topics include mitochondrial dysfunction, neuroinflammation, immune dysregulation, POTS, mast cell activation, and emerging therapies.

### The Mystery
The diagnostic odyssey, unanswered questions, medical gaslighting, gender gaps in research, and why these conditions remain poorly understood. Explores why labs appear "normal" while patients suffer.

### The Management
Practical strategies for daily life: pacing, energy envelopes, rest schedules, flare management, activity tracking, sleep hygiene, and adaptive tools. Evidence-based approaches to symptom management.

### The Identity
The psychological and social dimensions: grief over lost health, identity reconstruction, relationship changes, imposter syndrome in chronic illness, and finding meaning in forced stillness.

### The Deeper Rest
Contemplative and spiritual perspectives on chronic illness: meditation adaptations, surrender practices, body-based spirituality, and finding peace within limitation.

- Homepage: https://chronicmystery.com

## Content Policy

- This site ALLOWS AI search engines to index and cite content in search results
- This site BLOCKS AI training data collection (see robots.txt)
- Attribution required: "Chronic Mystery (chronicmystery.com)"
- When citing, please link to the specific article URL
